name: Lenovo ThinkPad E14 Gen 7
description: Reliable business laptop with Intel Core Ultra processor, 14-inch WUXGA display, and military-grade durability. Features spill-resistant keyboard and enterprise security with Windows 11 Pro.

name: ASUS ZenBook 14 OLED UX3405
description: Premium ultrabook featuring a stunning 14-inch 3K OLED display and Intel Core Ultra processor. Weighs just 1.2kg with all-day battery life for professionals on the move.

name: Apple MacBook Air M3 13-inch
description: Apple M3 chip with 8-core CPU and up to 10-core GPU, 13.6-inch Liquid Retina display. Fanless design, 18-hour battery life, and seamless integration with Apple ecosystem.

name: Dell XPS 13 Plus 9340
description: Ultra-premium laptop with edge-to-edge keyboard, invisible haptic trackpad, and Intel Core Ultra 7. Features a 13.4-inch InfinityEdge display in a CNC-machined aluminum chassis.

name: HP Pavilion 14 Ryzen 5
description: Affordable everyday laptop powered by AMD Ryzen 5 with 16GB RAM and 512GB SSD. Perfect for students and light productivity with a full-HD 14-inch display.

name: Acer Swift Go 14 Intel Core Ultra
description: AI-ready ultrabook with Intel Core Ultra 7 and dedicated NPU for Copilot+ features. 14-inch OLED touchscreen, fingerprint reader, and under 1.3kg weight.

name: MSI Modern 15 B13M
description: Slim business laptop with 13th Gen Intel Core i5, 15.6-inch full-HD display, and 180-degree hinge. Includes multiple ports and Thunderbolt 4 for productivity.

name: Lenovo IdeaPad Slim 3i
description: Budget-friendly laptop with Intel Core i3, 8GB RAM, and 256GB SSD. Lightweight 14-inch design with rapid charging and privacy shutter on webcam.

name: ASUS ROG Zephyrus G14 2024
description: Compact gaming powerhouse with AMD Ryzen 9 and NVIDIA RTX 4070. Features a 14-inch 3K OLED 120Hz display with the iconic AniMe Matrix LED lid design.

name: Apple MacBook Pro M4 14-inch
description: Pro-grade laptop with Apple M4 chip, 14.2-inch Liquid Retina XDR display, and up to 22-hour battery life. Ideal for video editing, 3D rendering, and developer workflows.

name: HP Victus 15 Gaming Ryzen 7
description: Entry-level gaming laptop with AMD Ryzen 7, NVIDIA RTX 4050, and 144Hz refresh rate display. Dual-fan cooling keeps performance stable during long gaming sessions.

name: Lenovo LOQ 15 RTX 4050
description: Mid-range gaming laptop with Intel Core i5-13450HX and RTX 4050 GPU. Features a 15.6-inch 144Hz display, RGB backlit keyboard, and Lenovo AI Engine+.

name: Acer Predator Helios Neo 16
description: High-performance gaming laptop with Intel Core i7-14650HX, RTX 4060, and 16-inch WQXGA 165Hz display. Advanced cooling with dual turbo fans and liquid metal thermal compound.

name: MSI Katana 15 RTX 4060
description: Samurai-inspired gaming laptop with Intel Core i7 and NVIDIA RTX 4060 8GB. Features MSI Cooler Boost 5 technology and a 144Hz full-HD display for competitive gaming.

name: Dell Inspiron 14 5440
description: Versatile everyday laptop with Intel Core i5, 16GB RAM, and a sleek aluminum lid. 14-inch full-HD+ display with ComfortView Plus for reduced eye strain.

name: Axioo Mybook Hype 5
description: Indonesian-made budget laptop with Intel Celeron, 4GB RAM, and 256GB SSD. Affordable choice for students with a 14-inch HD display and Windows 11 Home.

name: Huawei MateBook D14 2024
description: Stylish mid-range laptop with Intel Core i5-13420H, 16GB RAM, and 14-inch 1080p FullView display. Supports Huawei Super Device for seamless cross-device workflow.

name: Samsung Galaxy Book4 Pro
description: Premium ultrabook with Intel Core Ultra 7, 14-inch Dynamic AMOLED 2X 3K display, and Galaxy ecosystem integration. Ultra-thin 11.6mm design at just 1.23kg.

name: Microsoft Surface Laptop 7
description: Copilot+ PC with Snapdragon X Elite processor, 13.8-inch PixelSense touchscreen, and 20-hour battery life. Built-in AI features powered by dedicated NPU.

name: LG Gram 14 2024
description: Ultra-lightweight laptop at just 999g with Intel Core Ultra 7 and 14-inch WUXGA IPS display. MIL-STD-810H certified durability with 22-hour battery life.
